title: CVE-2007-3108 — CVSS 1.2 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2007-3108

CVSS Score: 1.2 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2007-08-08T01:17:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

The BN_from_montgomery function in crypto/bn/bn_mont.c in OpenSSL 0.9.8e and earlier does not properly perform Montgomery multiplication, which might allow local users to conduct a side-channel attack and retrieve RSA private keys.

References: http://cvs.openssl.org/chngview?cn=16275, http://lists.vmware.com/pipermail/security-announce/2008/000002.html, http://openssl.org/news/patch-CVE-2007-3108.txt
